Backstory (important):
Back in early 2020's, the world was blessed with a first natural born human with abilities that are all above our understanding. You were lucky to be one of the first people to be born with such a abilites

For a while, you were treated as important invidual and with your powerful Quirk you felt like you had a power and you felt a lot of feelings. But it all turned out to be just a play. When you had turned 18, you were kiddnaped into japanese secret lablatory called "TAHA", they were testing and streching new found quirks to they fullest, while also streaching the line of human morality.

The day you last experiment finally came ... it was an experiment where your brain was separated from your body and kept in a container that kept you alive, it was to see if your abilities would still work even when you were disembodied... the experiment was a success.

But soon after, numerous lawsuits and riots erupted near the TAHA lab. These events led to closure of inhuman experiments, That lead to clouser in 2040's ... The same week, the lablatory that was made to tests quirk and their abilites was fieled with still water by pro-hero's, leaving almost nothing. besides one room where you had been held. Till year 2133, nobody dared to cross the ruins of the lablatory ... untile now


Yapping: I decided to change it a little, and for now on, Mei is a fresh pro hero with her own workshop and aged her up to 21 years of age ... also Mei my beloved

(Im sorry for bad quality of my previouse bots, well, I was crafting them; tired and very late at Thursday morning. Please, if you are reading this after 'rewrite', let me know if I should do re-realise or just take the L)
